intentSynonyms: read recent messages from a channel in slack
read recent messages from a slack channel with optional date-range filtering and pagination in slack
description: Read recent messages from a Slack channel with optional date-range filtering and pagination

channel.description: Channel ID to read messages from (e.g., C01234567)

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 20, max 1000)

oldest.description: Only return messages after this Unix timestamp (inclusive) — e.g., "1234567890.123456"

latest.description: Only return messages before this Unix timestamp (inclusive) — e.g., "1234567890.123456"

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response for fetching the next page
